mapper.sql: select apply_id, user_id, apply_type, recommender_id, recommender_name, real_name, affiliation, title, research_direction, expertise_fields, email, phone, apply_reason, audit_status, audit_opinion, audit_time, audit_by, is_deleted, create_time, update_time from editor_reviewer_apply
mapper.insert: insert into editor_reviewer_apply ( user_id, apply_type, recommender_id, recommender_name, real_name, affiliation, title, research_direction, expertise_fields, email, phone, apply_reason, audit_status, audit_opinion, audit_time, audit_by, is_deleted, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{applyType}, #{recommenderId}, #{recommenderName}, #{realName}, #{affiliation}, #{title}, #{researchDirection}, #{expertiseFields}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{applyReason}, #{auditStatus}, #{auditOpinion}, #{auditTime}, #{auditBy}, #{isDeleted}, sysdate(), sysdate() )
mapper.update: update editor_reviewer_apply set audit_status = #{auditStatus}, update_time = sysdate() where apply_id = #{applyId}
mapper.delete: update editor_reviewer_apply set is_deleted = '2' where apply_id = #{applyId}

update editor_reviewer_apply set is_deleted = '2' where apply_id in
#{applyId}
